nodes.title: FAQ
widgets_values:
# FAQ

**How do I use this??**

Build your prompt and segments in the director timeline, then verify the Model Loader block before queuing.

Workflow docs: <https://github.com/GeekatplayStudio/video-editor-suite/tree/main/docs>

**Which LTX jobs is this workflow best for?**

- Use this file for text-to-video and timeline-guided image-to-video.
- Use the bundled First Last Frame workflows for first/last-frame and sparse keyframe shots.
- For V2V-style motion guidance, load a reference clip with `GAPLoadVideoUI` in a guide-based LTX workflow and feed its `IMAGE` output into `GAPSequencer`.
- The bundled audio path is audio-driven and lip-sync-ready, but strict phoneme lip-sync still needs an external stage.

**What should I install first?**

Run `install.bat` from this package once. It installs the Python deps, ffmpeg setup, `ComfyUI-KJNodes`, and the bundled LTX model set used by these example workflows.

**Where do I download these models??**

Shared LTX links: <https://github.com/wildminder/awesome-ltx2?tab=readme-ov-file>

Put these files here before queuing:
- `ComfyUI/models/checkpoints/ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors`
  <https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3-fp8/blob/main/ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors>
- `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors`
  <https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors>
- `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders/ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors`
  Browse the LTX-2.3 files page: <https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/tree/main>
- `ComfyUI/models/vae/LTX23_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors`
  <https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/vae/LTX23_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors>
- `ComfyUI/models/vae/LTX23_video_vae_bf16.safetensors`
  <https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/vae/LTX23_video_vae_bf16.safetensors>
- `ComfyUI/models/vae/taeltx2_3.safetensors`
  <https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/vae/taeltx2_3.safetensors>
- `ComfyUI/models/latent_upscale_models/ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors`
  <https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/blob/main/ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors>

The LoRA node in this workflow currently points at:
- `ComfyUI/models/loras/ltx2/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-dynamic_fro09_avg_rank_105_bf16.safetensors`

If you do not have that exact file, switch the loader to:
- `ComfyUI/models/loras/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors`
  <https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/blob/main/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors>

**I'm getting errors when running this workflow!**

Run `install.bat` first, then double check that every file above is in the matching folder. The x2 upscaler here is the v1.1 hotfix. If you only have older upscalers, change the LatentUpscaleModelLoader selection inside the Model Loader block.

**I want to use my own models!**

Change the loaders in the Model Loader block and keep the destination folders the same.

nodes.title: Model Loader Note
widgets_values: â†“ Select your own models in this subgraph â†“

nodes.title: Geekatplay Sequencer Note
widgets_values:
Use one image at full strength for regular image to video.

If frame_insert is -1, it will be inserted at the last frame.

The insert_mode allows to switch between inserting images by setting the exact frame or by setting the exact second.

nodes.title: FAQ
widgets_values:
# FAQ

**How do I set the length of the video?**

Set the duration and model choices in the Model Loader Subgraph ->

**How do I use custom audio?**

Load audio into `GAPLoadAudioUI`, trim it there if needed, and set `use custom audio` to `true` in the sequencer block.

**What is this workflow best for?**

Use this file for first/last-frame image guidance plus custom audio or narration-driven timing. The built-in audio path is lip-sync-ready, but exact phoneme lip-sync still requires an external stage.

Workflow docs: <https://github.com/GeekatplayStudio/video-editor-suite/tree/main/docs>

**What should I install first?**

Run `install.bat` from this package once. It installs the Python deps, ffmpeg setup, `ComfyUI-KJNodes`, and the bundled LTX model set used by these example workflows.

**Where do I download these models??**

Shared LTX links: <https://github.com/wildminder/awesome-ltx2?tab=readme-ov-file>

Put these files here before queuing:
- `ComfyUI/models/checkpoints/ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors`
  <https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3-fp8/blob/main/ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors>
- `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors`
  <https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors>
- `ComfyUI/models/vae/LTX23_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors`
  <https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/vae/LTX23_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors>
- `ComfyUI/models/vae/LTX23_video_vae_bf16.safetensors`
  <https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/vae/LTX23_video_vae_bf16.safetensors>
- `ComfyUI/models/vae/taeltx2_3.safetensors`
  <https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/vae/taeltx2_3.safetensors>
- `ComfyUI/models/latent_upscale_models/ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors`
  <https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/blob/main/ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors>

The LoRA node in this workflow currently points at:
- `ComfyUI/models/loras/ltx2/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-dynamic_fro09_avg_rank_105_bf16.safetensors`

If you do not have that exact file, switch the loader to:
- `ComfyUI/models/loras/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors`
  <https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/blob/main/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors>

**I keep getting errors when running this workflow!**

Run `install.bat` first, then double check that every file above is in the matching folder. The x2 upscaler here is the v1.1 hotfix. If you only have older upscalers, change the LatentUpscaleModelLoader selection inside the Model Loader Subgraph.

**I want to use my own models!**

Change the loaders inside the Model Loader Subgraph -> and keep the destination folders the same.

nodes.title: Geekatplay LTX 2.3 Director Lab
widgets_values:
# Geekatplay LTX 2.3 Director Lab

Use this canvas as the single entry point for the main LTX 2.3 modes:

- **Left lane**: `GAPDirector` for text-to-video, timeline prompt edits, and guide-image timing.
- **Right lane**: First/last-frame and custom-audio generation using the proven FFLF lane from the bundled workflow.
- **V2V helper**: load a reference clip in `GAPLoadVideoUI`, then route its `images` output into the right-lane `GAPSequencer` `multi_input` pin when you want motion guidance from a video instead of still frames.
- **Lip-sync handoff**: export the generated shot, then open the separate `Geekatplay Video Editor Suite - LipSync GAP Bridge.json` workflow if `ComfyUI-LipSync-GAP` is installed.

Keep the lanes separate unless you intentionally rewire them. They are bundled together so you can choose the right path from one canvas without losing the validated starting graphs.

nodes.title: V2V Helper
widgets_values:
Load a reference clip here for V2V-style motion guidance.

Connect `images` to the right-lane `GAPSequencer` `multi_input` pin when you want video guidance instead of stills.
